title: Zoro and Sanji Enter the Match
description: Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.
scene: Across pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: He must feel terrible right now...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That swords- Man sure can talk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Boss will probably choose him next round.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Reindeer is a tough guy, too.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Cheer as the day back fight continues!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Wait... isn't chopper in the 2nd round!?

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: Wahahah. This is strategy! gambling strategy!!

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: The rule is "cannot exchange the contestants."

dialogue.speaker: Foxy Pirate
dialogue.text: Why do you get to decide!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You are listening their entrance music...

dialogue.speaker: Hamburg
dialogue.text: It's our returning champions for Groggy Ring!!!

dialogue.speaker: Hamburg
dialogue.text: They are now entering the field.

summary: Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.
